title: rubus celtoideus
intro: Rubus celtoideus, also known as the Celts' thimbleberry, is a species of thimbleberry that is native to North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus celtoideus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Rubus celtoideus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
